title: Trump urged uprising, but as bombs fall, Iranians are ‘too scared to move’
summary_full: Some Iranians living in Dubai say their families celebrated the death of the supreme leader, Ayatollah Ali Khamenei, but the war could leave Iran in a worse situation than before.
